project.title: Stress-induced NONO interactomes
project.projectDescription: Characterization of sulforaphane- and starvation-induced NONO interactomes in wild type andNEAT1 knockout MCF7 cells
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: MCF7 and MCF7 NEAT1 knockout cells with stable expression of TurboID-V5-NONO were generatedand subjected to suforaphane or starvation. Biotinylated proteins were purufued from nuclear extracts using streptavidin-coated magnetic beads. Trypsinized porteins were labelled with TMT and run on Exploris 480 mass spec.
project.dataProcessingProtocol: Raw data were analyzed using MaxQuant (version 2.4.9.0) with the integrated Andromeda search engine.
